description_long: This object is an old, weathered gravestone set into a rectangular stone base, surrounded by a patch of grass and earth. The gravestone itself is arched at the top and made of rusted metal, showing signs of corrosion and age, with a patina of brown and reddish hues. The base is a solid, rectangular block of gray stone, providing stability and contrast to the metal headstone. The front face of the gravestone is mostly blank or heavily worn, while the back reveals faint, partially legible inscriptions. The ground around the base is uneven, with tufts of grass and soil, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for a long time. The overall appearance is somber and utilitarian, typical of older grave markers found in urban or historical cemeteries.
description: A weathered, arched metal gravestone set in a rectangular stone base, surrounded by grass and earth, with faint inscriptions on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rusted, arched metal gravestone and the grassy, earthy base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the metal gravestone and the depth of the stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing faint inscriptions on the back of the gravestone and the solid stone base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gravestone's thickness and the grassy base.
